response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with open-source AI/geo platforms, and demonstrable technical depth across languages and systems, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership at scale, cloud architecture ownership, or director-level strategic impact required for this role.
strengths: Proven experience building AI-agent infrastructure and tooling at Stripe
Entrepreneurial track record with open-source AI/geo platforms used by NGOs
Deep technical fluency across cloud-native stacks (Kubernetes, Docker, AWS CDK) and multiple languages
concerns: No explicit mention of AI/ML model development, training, or deployment at scale
Lacks documented leadership in cloud product strategy or customer advisory roles
No advanced degree in AI or related field, and startup experience is self-initiated, not corporate-intrapreneurial
